props.label: Inpaint Engine
props.name: dropdown
props.info: Version of Fooocus inpaint model. If set, use performance Quality or Speed (no performance LoRAs) for best results.

props.label: Inpaint Denoising Strength
props.name: slider
props.info: Same as the denoising strength in A1111 inpaint. Only used in inpaint, not used in outpaint. (Outpaint always use 1.0)

props.label: Inpaint Respective Field
props.name: slider
props.info: The area to inpaint. Value 0 is same as "Only Masked" in A1111. Value 1 is same as "Whole Image" in A1111. Only used in inpaint, not used in outpaint. (Outpaint always use 1.0)

props.label: Mask Erode or Dilate
props.name: slider
props.info: Positive value will make white area in the mask larger, negative value will make white area smaller. (default is 0, always processed before any mask invert)

info.description: Option from: ['Inpaint or Outpaint (default)', 'Improve Detail (face, hand, eyes, etc.)', 'Modify Content (add objects, change background, etc.)']

props.label: Inpaint Engine
props.name: dropdown
props.info: Version of Fooocus inpaint model. If set, use performance Quality or Speed (no performance LoRAs) for best results.

props.label: Inpaint Denoising Strength
props.name: slider
props.info: Same as the denoising strength in A1111 inpaint. Only used in inpaint, not used in outpaint. (Outpaint always use 1.0)

props.label: Inpaint Respective Field
props.name: slider
props.info: The area to inpaint. Value 0 is same as "Only Masked" in A1111. Value 1 is same as "Whole Image" in A1111. Only used in inpaint, not used in outpaint. (Outpaint always use 1.0)

props.label: Mask Erode or Dilate
props.name: slider
props.info: Positive value will make white area in the mask larger, negative value will make white area smaller. (default is 0, always processed before any mask invert)

props.label: Aspect Ratios
props.name: radio
props.info: width × height

props.label: Negative Prompt
props.name: textbox
props.info: Describing what you do not want to see.

props.label: Refiner Switch At
props.name: slider
props.info: Use 0.4 for SD1.5 realistic models; or 0.667 for SD1.5 anime models; or 0.8 for XL-refiners; or any value for switching two SDXL models.

props.label: Guidance Scale
props.name: slider
props.info: Higher value means style is cleaner, vivider, and more artistic.

props.label: Image Sharpness
props.name: slider
props.info: Higher value means image and texture are sharper.

props.label: Positive ADM Guidance Scaler
props.name: slider
props.info: The scaler multiplied to positive ADM (use 1.0 to disable).

props.label: Negative ADM Guidance Scaler
props.name: slider
props.info: The scaler multiplied to negative ADM (use 1.0 to disable).

props.label: ADM Guidance End At Step
props.name: slider
props.info: When to end the guidance from positive/negative ADM.

props.label: CFG Mimicking from TSNR
props.name: slider
props.info: Enabling Fooocus's implementation of CFG mimicking for TSNR (effective when real CFG > mimicked CFG).

props.label: CLIP Skip
props.name: slider
props.info: Bypass CLIP layers to avoid overfitting (use 1 to not skip any layers, 2 is recommended).

props.label: Generate Image Grid for Each Batch
props.name: checkbox
props.info: (Experimental) This may cause performance problems on some computers and certain internet conditions.

props.label: Forced Overwrite of Sampling Step
props.name: slider
props.info: Set as -1 to disable. For developer debugging.

props.label: Forced Overwrite of Refiner Switch Step
props.name: slider
props.info: Set as -1 to disable. For developer debugging.

props.label: Forced Overwrite of Generating Width
props.name: slider
props.info: Set as -1 to disable. For developer debugging. Results will be worse for non-standard numbers that SDXL is not trained on.

props.label: Forced Overwrite of Generating Height
props.name: slider
props.info: Set as -1 to disable. For developer debugging. Results will be worse for non-standard numbers that SDXL is not trained on.

props.label: Forced Overwrite of Denoising Strength of "Vary"
props.name: slider
props.info: Set as negative number to disable. For developer debugging.

props.label: Forced Overwrite of Denoising Strength of "Upscale"
props.name: slider
props.info: Set as negative number to disable. For developer debugging.

props.label: Disable Preview
props.name: checkbox
props.info: Disable preview during generation.

props.label: Disable Intermediate Results
props.name: checkbox
props.info: Disable intermediate results during generation, only show final gallery.

props.label: Disable seed increment
props.name: checkbox
props.info: Disable automatic seed increment when image number is > 1.

props.label: Black Out NSFW
props.name: checkbox
props.info: Use black image if NSFW is detected.

props.label: Save Metadata to Images
props.name: checkbox
props.info: Adds parameters to generated images allowing manual regeneration.

props.label: Metadata Scheme
props.name: radio
props.info: Image Prompt parameters are not included. Use png and a1111 for compatibility with Civitai.

props.label: Debug Preprocessors
props.name: checkbox
props.info: See the results from preprocessors.

props.label: Skip Preprocessors
props.name: checkbox
props.info: Do not preprocess images. (Inputs are already canny/depth/cropped-face/etc.)

props.label: Softness of ControlNet
props.name: slider
props.info: Similar to the Control Mode in A1111 (use 0.0 to disable).

props.label: Debug Enhance Masks
props.name: checkbox
props.info: Show enhance masks in preview and final results

props.label: Debug GroundingDINO
props.name: checkbox
props.info: Use GroundingDINO boxes instead of more detailed SAM masks

props.label: Inpaint Engine
props.name: dropdown
props.info: Version of Fooocus inpaint model. If set, use performance Quality or Speed (no performance LoRAs) for best results.

props.label: Inpaint Denoising Strength
props.name: slider
props.info: Same as the denoising strength in A1111 inpaint. Only used in inpaint, not used in outpaint. (Outpaint always use 1.0)

props.label: Inpaint Respective Field
props.name: slider
props.info: The area to inpaint. Value 0 is same as "Only Masked" in A1111. Value 1 is same as "Whole Image" in A1111. Only used in inpaint, not used in outpaint. (Outpaint always use 1.0)

props.label: Mask Erode or Dilate
props.name: slider
props.info: Positive value will make white area in the mask larger, negative value will make white area smaller. (default is 0, always processed before any mask invert)

props.label: GroundingDINO Box Erode or Dilate
props.name: slider
props.info: Positive value will make white area in the mask larger, negative value will make white area smaller. (default is 0, processed before SAM)
